title: Kidplokio Kids Pretend Play Food Set Fun Picnic Plastic Food Utensils Assorted,
description:
The Kidplokio pretend play plastic food set comes with fun fantasy picnic and fast food for your child to play with. They can feast on pretend treats, burgers, fries, and drinks with their friends and stuffed animals during pretend playtime! Pretend play is a great opportunity for kids to use their creativity and imagination to develop learning skills. With pretend play food sets, they can learn the values of sharing with their friends and how sharing a meal together is a great way to make new friends. Each food and utensil item included is constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that can be used during indoor or outdoor play. The items can all be hand-washed and sanitized to keep items clean after use

The Kidplokio pretend play plastic food set comes with fun fantasy picnic and fast food for your child to play with. They can feast on pretend treats, burgers, fries, and drinks with their friends and stuffed animals during pretend playtime!

Pretend play is a great opportunity for kids to use their creativity and imagination to develop learning skills. With pretend play food sets, they can learn the values of sharing with their friends and how sharing a meal together is a great way to make new friends.

Key Features

  • PRETEND PLAY PICNIC FOOD SET – The Kidplokio pretend play plastic food set comes with fun fantasy picnic and fast food for your child to play with. They can feast on pretend treats, burgers, fries and drinks with their friends and stuffed animals during pretend play time!
  • ENCOURAGES IMAGINATION AND CREATIVITY – Pretend play is a great opportunity for kids to use their creativity and imagination to develop learning skills. With pretend play food sets, they can learn the values of sharing with their friends and how sharing a meal together is a great way to make new friends.
  • DURABLE PLASTIC CONSTRUCTION – Each food and utensil item included is constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that can be used during indoor or outdoor play. The items can all be hand-washed and sanitized to keep items clean after use.
  • ASSORTED FOOD INCLUDED – These food sets come with assorted picnic and dessert foods for kids to play with including cheeseburgers, fries, ice cream, chicken nuggets, hot dogs, condiments and more. Each set also comes with utensils and cups (Please note – some items in set may vary from photo based on availability).
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Assorted pretend play food sets (2 styles); Materials: plastic; Colors: assorted; Choking hazard – small parts, safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision
